    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AlertSystem
    Module for managing user notifications.
    EmailService
    Notification platform that allows for sending messages to terminal output via email medium.
    NotificationMedium
    Interface that allows for delivery of notification messages to terminal output through different platforms.
    SMSService
    Notification platform that allows for sending messages to terminal output via SMS message medium.
    WhatsAppService
    Notification platform that allows for sending messages to terminal output via WhatsApp medium.
